description: Reviewed dispositions for Java-vs-.NET API-surface deltas. Entries are keyed by the api_review.key values emitted into reports/api-surface-comparison.json.

entries.note: XmpBox schema JavaBean accessors and property-object overloads are represented by the C# schema property/helper surface and XML round-trip storage instead of one-for-one Java method names.

Java TRUE/FALSE constants are exposed as C# TrueValue/FalseValue constants while preserving boolean parsing and string output behavior.
Java TRUE/FALSE constants are exposed as C# TrueValue/FalseValue constants while preserving boolean parsing and string output behavior.
Java enum method is exposed as the C# CardinalityExtensions.IsArray() extension method.
Java getProperty() is exposed as GetPropertyValue() to avoid ambiguity with inherited named-property lookup in the C# type hierarchy.
Java getType() is exposed as GetTypeValue() to avoid conflict with object.GetType() and keep the PDF/A field meaning explicit.
Java annotation element type() is exposed through C# PropertyTypeAttribute.TypeName and Type properties.
Java annotation elements are exposed as C# StructuredTypeAttribute.Namespace and PreferedPrefix properties.
Java annotation elements are exposed as C# StructuredTypeAttribute.Namespace and PreferedPrefix properties.
Parser artifact for the private Java enum constructor; not a public API member to port.
Java enum predicate methods are exposed as C# boolean properties on the enum-like Types registry.
Java enum predicate methods are exposed as C# boolean properties on the enum-like Types registry.
Java enum predicate methods are exposed as C# boolean properties on the enum-like Types registry.
Version accessors are intentionally named GetVersionValue/SetVersionValue in C# to make the XMP field value explicit.
Version accessors are intentionally named GetVersionValue/SetVersionValue in C# to make the XMP field value explicit.
Java getErrorType() is exposed as the C# Type property on XmpParsingException.
Custom Java XML factory constructor is not exposed because the .NET serializer uses XmlWriter/XmlDocument settings directly.
Java DOM helper method is internal to the .NET serializer design; public serialization behavior is exposed through Serialize().
Java DOM helper method is internal to the .NET serializer design; public serialization behavior is exposed through Serialize().
Java DOM helper method is internal to the .NET serializer design; public serialization behavior is exposed through Serialize().
Java annotation is ported as C# PropertyTypeAttribute; consumers still use the idiomatic short attribute form [PropertyType].
Java annotation is ported as C# StructuredTypeAttribute; consumers still use the idiomatic short attribute form [StructuredType].
